About

"Fascinated by how machines learn. Focused on making it useful."

M.Sc. AI/ML student at Christ University, currently working as an AI Engineer Intern at the Centre for AI. I'm genuinely fascinated by how machines learn, and even more interested in making that actually useful. My work spans computer vision, ML pipelines, and full-stack AI. I care a lot more about models that work in the real world than ones that just look good on paper.

Centre for AI · Christ University

Selected Work

01

Automatic License Plate Recognition

In Progress

Building a real-time vehicle detection and license plate recognition pipeline using YOLOv8 and SORT tracking. Implementing IoU-based plate-to-vehicle association with temporal aggregation to reduce duplicate predictions. Applying image preprocessing techniques to improve OCR performance under motion blur and varying lighting conditions. Designing a relational MySQL schema for scalable backend integration.

YOLOv8 SORT OCR MySQL
View on GitHub ↗
02

NutriAdapt — Personalized Diet Planning

In Progress

Developing a full-stack web application generating personalized Indian meal plans based on user health profiles, dietary preferences, and medical conditions. Implemented calorie target calculation using the Mifflin–St Jeor equation and a rule-based recommendation engine filtering foods by condition. Built a curated nutrition dataset (~100+ Indian foods) and a constraint-relaxation meal selection algorithm to ensure safe, varied recommendations.

React Vite FastAPI Python
View on GitHub ↗
